scenario.ascesa-aurion.name: Rise of Aurion
scenario.ascesa-aurion.description: You lead Aurion, a small industrial republic perched on the Aurianan peninsula. Caught between great-power ambitions and the long shadow of the Borean Federation, you have one shot at turning your country into a nation the world cannot afford to ignore.
country.aurion.name: Aurion
country.velmara.name: Velmara
country.korthia.name: Korthia
country.sundria.name: Sundria
country.federazione-borea.name: Borean Federation
country.tundria.name: Tundria
country.norhavn.name: Norhavn
country.rusvenia.name: Rusvenia
country.iskal.name: Iskal
country.calanthia.name: Calanthia
country.xanaba.name: Xanaba

country.mireku.name: Mireku

country.sankai.name: Sankai
country.pelagia.name: Pelagia

country.zembu.name: Zembu
country.antarah.name: Antarah
tech.civil.irrigation.name: Modern Irrigation
tech.civil.irrigation.description: Networks of canals and low-cost pumps boost agricultural productivity by 15% and stabilize harvests.
tech.civil.tax_reform.name: Tax Reform
tech.civil.tax_reform.description: A streamlined revenue service collects more by closing loopholes and unlocks targeted fiscal audits.
tech.civil.public_health.name: Public Healthcare
tech.civil.public_health.description: Basic clinics and mass vaccination raise life expectancy and lift the government's standing with the public.
tech.civil.urbanization.name: Planned Urbanization
tech.civil.urbanization.description: Master plans for the growing cities accelerate the service sector and grow overall GDP.
tech.civil.automated_factories.name: Automated Factories
tech.civil.automated_factories.descripti: Robotic lines and computerized production push the industrial sector to a new level.
tech.civil.education_reform.name: Education Reform
tech.civil.education_reform.description: A new generation of public universities trains scientists and engineers, accelerating both research and the tech sector.
tech.civil.green_energy.name: Green Energy
tech.civil.green_energy.description: Wind, solar, and a redesigned grid lower energy costs and earn you points with the public.
tech.civil.high_speed_rail.name: High-Speed Rail
tech.civil.high_speed_rail.description: Fast links between major cities unlock new flows of people, goods, and service productivity.
tech.civil.biotechnology.name: Advanced Biotechnology
tech.civil.biotechnology.description: Genomics, cell therapies, and bio-engineered materials feed a high-margin tech industry.
tech.civil.smart_cities.name: Smart Cities
tech.civil.smart_cities.description: Hyper-connected cities, optimized traffic, and digital services everywhere: huge efficiency, happy citizens.
tech.civil.post_scarcity.name: Post-Scarcity Economy
tech.civil.post_scarcity.description: Full automation and experimental cold fusion promise widespread abundance and a new industrial age.
tech.military.modern_doctrine.name: Modern Military Doctrine
tech.military.modern_doctrine.descriptio: Reformed training and chain of command: your units become more responsive and better coordinated.
tech.military.precision_artillery.name: Precision Artillery
tech.military.precision_artillery.descri: Guided shells and counter-battery radars: fewer wasted rounds, more on-target fire.
tech.military.armored_navy.name: Armored Navy
tech.military.armored_navy.description: New frigates and destroyers with composite armor reshape the balance of power at sea.
tech.military.air_superiority.name: Air Superiority
tech.military.air_superiority.descriptio: Next-gen fighters and advanced detection radars give you a decisive edge in the skies.
tech.military.combined_arms.name: Combined Arms
tech.military.combined_arms.description: Integrated infantry, artillery, and air operations: a rewritten doctrine.
tech.military.drones.name: Combat Drones
tech.military.drones.description: Armed UAVs and autonomous scouts multiply your air arm's reach at low cost.
tech.military.carrier_groups.name: Carrier Groups
tech.military.carrier_groups.description: Modern carriers with integrated escorts project your power wherever there is sea.
tech.military.integrated_command.name: Integrated Command
tech.military.integrated_command.descrip: Unified operations centers orchestrate every force on the field in real time.
tech.military.cyber_warfare.name: Cyber Warfare
tech.military.cyber_warfare.description: Offensive cyber units sabotage enemy command while protecting your own critical networks.
tech.military.hypersonic_missiles.name: Hypersonic Missiles
tech.military.hypersonic_missiles.descri: Mach 5+ vectors render adversary missile defenses obsolete.
tech.military.autonomous_warfare.name: Autonomous Warfare
tech.military.autonomous_warfare.descrip: Drone swarms and AI-led unmanned vehicles redefine the battlefield.
tech.intel.counter_intel.name: Counter-Intelligence
tech.intel.counter_intel.description: Domestic surveillance networks and hardened protocols make life harder for foreign agents on your soil.
tech.intel.cryptography.name: Advanced Cryptography
tech.intel.cryptography.description: Near-unbreakable ciphers protect your traffic and unlock tech-theft operations abroad.
tech.intel.agent_training.name: Agent Training
tech.intel.agent_training.description: A new academy doubles the pool of operatives available to your services.
tech.intel.mass_propaganda.name: Mass Propaganda
tech.intel.mass_propaganda.description: Modern influence techniques let you run propaganda campaigns inside foreign nations.
tech.intel.sleeper_cells.name: Sleeper Cells
tech.intel.sleeper_cells.description: Networks of agents embedded for years inside enemy nations, ready to activate and destabilize.
tech.intel.signals_intelligence.name: Signals Intelligence
tech.intel.signals_intelligence.descript: Interception stations and traffic analysis vacuum up enemy communications at scale.
tech.intel.wet_operations.name: Wet Operations
tech.intel.wet_operations.description: Sabotage and targeted operations enter your services' standard repertoire.
tech.intel.global_network.name: Global Network
tech.intel.global_network.description: Your services become a permanent presence in every capital that matters.
tech.intel.quantum_decryption.name: Quantum Decryption
tech.intel.quantum_decryption.descriptio: Experimental quantum computers break adversary encryption: no secret is safe anymore.
tech.space.weather_satellites.name: Weather Satellites
tech.space.weather_satellites.descriptio: A small orbital constellation improves forecasts, harvests, and the quality of your research output.
tech.space.orbital_launch.name: Orbital Launch
tech.space.orbital_launch.description: Reusable launch vehicles turn your country into a spacefaring power: national pride climbs.
tech.space.communications_array.name: Communications Array
tech.space.communications_array.descript: A dedicated satellite fleet gives you independent, hardened communications.
tech.space.orbital_station.name: Orbital Station
tech.space.orbital_station.description: The first permanent space station: microgravity labs accelerate research and electrify the public.
tech.space.lunar_probe.name: Lunar Probe
tech.space.lunar_probe.description: A robotic mission to the Moon: the world looks at you with new respect, and your labs reap the rewards.
tech.space.lunar_base.name: Lunar Base
tech.space.lunar_base.description: A permanent outpost on the lunar surface: very few nations can claim the same.
tech.space.deep_space_telescope.name: Deep-Space Telescope
tech.space.deep_space_telescope.descript: An orbital observatory rewrites astronomy and pure-science research.
tech.space.mars_mission.name: Mars Mission
tech.space.mars_mission.description: The first astronauts walk on the red planet: a historic triumph for Aurion.
tech.space.mars_colony.name: Mars Colony
tech.space.mars_colony.description: A self-sustaining human colony on Mars: humanity becomes multi-planetary, and you made it possible.
event.diplomacy.border_incident.name: Border Incident
event.diplomacy.border_incident.descript: A Korthian patrol crossed the frontier and clashed with our border police. Casualties are limited but the press is screaming about provocation.
event.diplomacy.borealis_pressure.name: Borean Pressure
event.diplomacy.borealis_pressure.descri: The Borean ambassador asks you to scale back your regional ambitions. Their tone is polite; the warships off your coast, less so.
event.diplomacy.borealis_pressure.choice: Seek allies in Oriana and Norhavn
event.economy.resource_boom.name: Resource Discovery
event.economy.resource_boom.description: Geologists have located a major rare-earths deposit in the inland valleys. A rare opportunity, but local communities are already on edge.
event.economy.resource_boom.choice.publi: Establish a sovereign wealth fund for citizens
event.economy.financial_crisis.name: Liquidity Crisis
event.economy.financial_crisis.descripti: State coffers are nearly empty and international creditors are starting to ask uncomfortable questions. A decision is needed, fast.
event.economy.financial_crisis.choice.pr: Print money to cover the deficit
event.social.protests.name: Mass Protests
event.social.protests.description: Tens of thousands of citizens fill central Auronia demanding reform. The mood is tense but not yet violent.
event.social.protests.choice.ignore: Let them burn out on their own
event.social.scandal.name: Corruption Scandal
event.social.scandal.description: An opposition newspaper has published documents that embarrass your government. The pressure on social media grows by the hour.
event.social.scandal.choice.cover_up: Bury the story with public funds
event.social.scandal.choice.scapegoat: Sacrifice a minister as a scapegoat
event.social.terror_attack.name: Attack in the Capital
event.social.terror_attack.description: An explosion struck a market in Auronia. Dozens are dead and the trail points to a cell from the Sahel-Karoun.
event.social.terror_attack.choice.securi: Declare emergency powers and sweeping surveillance
event.social.terror_attack.choice.unity_: Address the nation with a call for unity
event.social.terror_attack.choice.invest: Run quiet operations abroad to find the source
event.military.defection.name: High-Ranking Defection
event.military.defection.description: A Korthian general staff colonel has requested political asylum, carrying a briefcase of classified documents.
event.military.defection.choice.return: Return him as a goodwill gesture
event.military.naval_clash.name: Naval Clash on the Open Sea
event.military.naval_clash.description: One of our ships and a Tenshidan vessel had a near-collision in disputed waters. Someone opened fire, and now answers are needed.
event.military.naval_clash.choice.escala: Respond with a show of force
event.military.naval_clash.choice.de_esc: Withdraw the ships and ask for clarification
event.military.naval_clash.choice.intern: Take the case to international arbitration
event.military.arms_offer.name: Arms Supply Offer
event.military.arms_offer.description: Both Borea and Tenshido are offering favorable arms packages in exchange for a political realignment.
event.spy.caught_abroad.name: Spy Caught Abroad
event.spy.caught_abroad.description: One of our agents has been identified and arrested on enemy soil. The international press has gone wild.
event.spy.enemy_caught.name: Enemy Agent Unmasked
event.spy.enemy_caught.description: Counter-intelligence has identified and captured a Korthian spy who had been active for months on your soil. What now?
event.spy.enemy_caught.choice.turn_agent: Turn him into a double agent
event.spy.enemy_caught.choice.silent_rel: Release him quietly as a diplomatic favor
event.spy.blackmail.name: Blackmail of a Minister
event.spy.blackmail.description: A foreign agency has compromising material on a member of your cabinet and is demanding concessions for their silence.
event.spy.double_agent.name: Suspected Double Agent
event.spy.double_agent.description: One of your senior agents may have been turned by Borean services. The evidence is incomplete.
event.spy.double_agent.choice.recruit_ba: Try to bring him back to your side
event.space.lost_probe.name: Lost Probe
event.space.lost_probe.description: One of our probes went silent during an orbital maneuver. Years of work are at risk.
event.space.lost_probe.choice.cancel: Cancel the program and cut losses
event.space.breakthrough.name: Scientific Breakthrough
event.space.breakthrough.description: Experiments aboard the orbital station have produced an unexpected and potentially revolutionary result.
event.space.breakthrough.choice.classify: Classify it as a military secret
event.space.breakthrough.choice.commerci: License it to an industrial consortium
event.diplomacy.alliance_offer.name: Alliance Offer
event.diplomacy.alliance_offer.descripti: Norhavn proposes a mutual-defense pact that could redraw the balance of the north. Borea will not be pleased.
event.diplomacy.alliance_offer.choice.co: Counter with a lighter trade treaty
event.diplomacy.summit_invite.name: Summit Invitation
event.diplomacy.summit_invite.descriptio: Calanthia is hosting an international summit in Tehuanca. Every major name will be there.
event.economy.tech_sector_boom.name: Tech Sector Boom
event.economy.tech_sector_boom.descripti: Your new graduates are launching startups at a furious pace. How do you ride the wave?
event.social.strike.name: General Strike
event.social.strike.description: Unions have called a three-day strike that will paralyze the country. Turnout is enormous.
event.social.strike.choice.break_strike: Force workers back to their jobs
event.social.strike.choice.mediate: Open a mediation between the parties
event.diplomacy.karoun_aggression.name: Karoun Aggression
event.diplomacy.karoun_aggression.descri: Karoun has launched a military incursion against Saharel. The international community is watching for your stance.
event.diplomacy.karoun_aggression.choice: Public condemnation and support to Saharel
event.economy.smuggling_ring.name: Smuggling Ring
event.economy.smuggling_ring.description: The services have uncovered a network bypassing customs at industrial scale. The threads reach prominent figures.
event.economy.smuggling_ring.choice.crac: Dismantle it with a sweeping operation
event.social.religious_unrest.name: Religious Unrest
event.social.religious_unrest.descriptio: A series of provocations against a religious community threatens to turn into widespread disorder.
event.social.religious_unrest.choice.app: Make concessions to the religious community
event.military.recruitment_drive.name: Recruitment Drive
event.military.recruitment_drive.descrip: The general staff is asking for more troops. Which path do you take?
event.economy.trade_dispute.name: Trade Dispute
event.economy.trade_dispute.description: Tenshido accuses your country of unfair practices and threatens tariffs on your industrial exports.
event.intel.foreign_propaganda.name: Foreign Propaganda
event.intel.foreign_propaganda.descripti: A coordinated media campaign is sowing doubt among your citizens. The origin is almost certainly external.
event.diplomacy.oriana_pact.name: Oriana Pact
event.diplomacy.oriana_pact.description: Tenshido proposes a regional cooperation organization for the eastern archipelago. You're invited as an associate member.
event.economy.industrial_accident.name: Industrial Accident
event.economy.industrial_accident.descri: A serious accident at a chemical plant has caused casualties and environmental damage. The footage is going viral.
event.economy.industrial_accident.choice: Pin the blame on private management
event.intel.recruit_dissident.name: Borean Dissident
event.intel.recruit_dissident.descriptio: A senior Borean official has secretly contacted our embassy. He wants to defect and cooperate.
event.intel.recruit_dissident.choice.rec: Recruit him as an operational asset
event.intel.recruit_dissident.choice.den: Deny him entry to avoid an incident
victory.economic.name: Economic Victory
victory.economic.description: Lift Aurion into the top three world economies by GDP. Money outweighs every army.
victory.military.name: Military Victory
victory.military.description: Control at least ten nations by force. The world only respects those who can dominate it.
victory.scientific.name: Scientific Victory
victory.scientific.description: Complete the first sustainable human colony on Mars. Aurion will lead humanity to the stars.
victory.diplomatic.name: Diplomatic Victory
victory.diplomatic.description: Build an alliance system covering at least 60% of the world's nations.
victory.domination.name: Total Domination
victory.domination.description: Control 20 nations, or be the world's top economy together with at least 15 nations under your flag.
difficulty.easy.name: Easy
difficulty.normal.name: Normal
difficulty.hard.name: Hard
difficulty.ironMan.name: Iron Man
bloc.ascesa.western.name: Pact of Auriana
bloc.ascesa.eastern.name: Borean Sphere
bloc.ascesa.non-aligned.name: Movement of the Free Lands
un.ascesa.peacekeeping.title: Council mediation in the contested region
un.ascesa.peacekeeping.description: The Council of Nations proposes a neutral force to separate the belligerents and freeze the front line.
un.ascesa.condemnation.tactical.title: Condemnation of prohibited weapon use
un.ascesa.condemnation.tactical.descript: Resolution formally condemning the use of tactical mass-destruction arms in the theatre of war.
un.ascesa.condemnation.strategic.title: Condemnation of strategic strike
un.ascesa.condemnation.strategic.descrip: Emergency Council session to condemn the strategic strike and weigh joint retaliatory measures.
un.ascesa.humanitarian.title: Aid programme for the poorer lands
un.ascesa.humanitarian.description: Coordinated support for the most fragile populations hit by famine, displacement and regional conflict.
un.ascesa.condemnation.sanctions.title: Motion against unilateral sanctions
un.ascesa.condemnation.sanctions.descrip: Formal debate on the legitimacy of the imposed sanctions regime and its impact on civilian populations.
un.ascesa.climate.tension.title: Council de-escalation pact
un.ascesa.climate.tension.description: Multilateral framework to lower tension between the spheres of influence and head off a cascading escalation.
un.ascesa.climate.periodic.title: Convention on world balance
un.ascesa.climate.periodic.description: Periodic treaty on climate and the use of natural resources, binding for every Council signatory.
